name: The Western Union Company
description: The Western Union Company is an American multinational financial services corporation headquartered in Denver, Colorado. As a global leader in cross-border, cross-currency money movement and payments, the company provides individuals and businesses with fast, reliable, and convenient ways to send and receive money around the world. With a history spanning over 170 years, Western Union operates an extensive digital and retail network, enabling financial inclusion and connecting people across borders through its sophisticated technology platform, which facilitates complex financial transactions in hundreds of currencies and numerous countries and territories worldwide.
